description: FunctionState (Placeholder -> Defined) and FunctionSourceState (Placeholder -> Noted) are parallel slot vectors over the same ID space storing near-identical data with near-identical same() logic. define_function consumes FunctionSource wholesale and promotes it into FunctionDef, which is just FunctionSource + surface. After definition the source map is never read again. Correct model: Placeholder -> Noted { source } -> Defined { source, surface }. FunctionDef, FunctionSourceSlot, FunctionSourceState, and FunctionSourceMap all disappear.
title: fz-knf-f: unify FunctionMap and FunctionSourceMap into a single three-state machine
